_comment: The full tracked universe. Everything worth scanning lives here. Active state lives in TradingView and journal/open.

equities.name: Alphabet Inc.
equities.notes: Search + Cloud + Waymo. AI integration across ads, cloud (Gemini), YouTube.

equities.name: Amazon.com Inc.
equities.notes: AWS + retail + advertising. AI chip differentiation (Trainium/Inferentia).

equities.name: Broadcom Inc.
equities.notes: Custom AI chips (Google TPU), networking, broadband. Messy financials but strong moat.

equities.name: Eli Lilly and Company
equities.notes: GLP-1 / obesity leader, large-cap healthcare growth anchor.

equities.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
equities.notes: ADR

equities.name: Meta Platforms
equities.notes: Social media monopoly. AI ad targeting efficiency + Reality Labs optionality.

equities.name: NVIDIA Corporation
equities.notes: AI GPU monopoly. Data center revenue growth, CUDA ecosystem lock-in.

equities.name: Microsoft Corporation
equities.notes: Office/Azure/Copilot. Enterprise AI distribution via existing customer base.

equities.name: Apple Inc.
equities.notes: iPhone cycle + Services growth. Lower multiple than mega-peers, large buyback.

equities.name: Advanced Micro Devices
equities.notes: NVDA competitor, AI GPU

equities.name: Arm Holdings
equities.notes: Chip architecture, AI edge

equities.name: Intercontinental Exchange
equities.notes: Exchange, clearing, data, and mortgage technology. Market plumbing name with energy and rates exposure.

equities.name: Cboe Global Markets
equities.notes: Options and volatility exchange. Direct read on derivatives activity, VIX products, and hedging demand.

equities.name: Berkshire Hathaway
equities.notes: Quality defensive compounder. Insurance, cash, operating businesses, and broad US economy exposure.

equities.name: Progressive Corporation
equities.notes: Property and casualty insurance compounder. Defensive financial with pricing-cycle and rate exposure.

equities.name: Robinhood Markets
equities.notes: Retail brokerage + crypto volume proxy

equities.name: Tesla
equities.notes: EV + autonomy + energy storage. High volatility, retail favorite, Elon factor.

equities.name: RTX Corporation
equities.notes: Aerospace and defense backlog, commercial + defense exposure.

equities.name: Freeport-McMoRan
equities.notes: Largest US copper miner. Equity proxy for copper price.

equities.name: ExxonMobil
equities.notes: Largest US oil major. Earnings May 1.

equities.name: First Solar Inc.
equities.notes: Solar manufacturing / clean energy policy and power-demand watchlist name.

equities.name: Constellation Energy
equities.notes: Nuclear + power demand winner tied to data centers and AI load growth.

equities.name: Vistra Corp.
equities.notes: Merchant power / generation exposure, benefits from tight power markets and AI demand.

equities.name: GE Vernova
equities.notes: Power equipment, grid, gas turbines, and electrification. AI power demand and grid buildout beneficiary.

equities.name: Quanta Services

equities.name: Cameco Corporation

equities.name: BWX Technologies
equities.notes: Nuclear components and government nuclear services. Defense and nuclear infrastructure crossover.

equities.name: Centrus Energy
equities.notes: Uranium enrichment and HALEU exposure. Speculative nuclear fuel-chain watchlist name.

equities.name: UnitedHealth Group
equities.notes: Largest US health insurer. Earnings and guidance are macro consumer health proxies.

equities.name: Abbott Laboratories
equities.notes: Medtech / diagnostics / diabetes monitoring (Libre). Defensive growth.

equities.name: Intuitive Surgical
equities.notes: Robotic surgery monopoly, durable growth, high margin.

equities.name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
equities.notes: Cystic fibrosis leader + expanding into pain, APOL1, sickle cell.

equities.name: Pfizer Inc.
equities.notes: Deep value pharma. Oncology via Seagen, GLP-1 oral candidate.

equities.name: HCA Healthcare
equities.notes: Largest US hospital operator. Healthcare utilization, labor cost, and consumer health proxy.

equities.name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
equities.notes: Life-science tools and diagnostics. Biotech funding cycle and lab demand bellwether.

equities.name: Lockheed Martin
equities.notes: Largest pure-play defense prime. F-35, hypersonics, missile defense.

equities.name: General Dynamics
equities.notes: Gulfstream + shipbuilding (Columbia/Virginia class subs) + combat systems.

equities.name: Northrop Grumman
equities.notes: B-21 bomber, space systems, missile defense. Purest space in SPX.

equities.name: KLA Corporation
equities.notes: Process control & inspection. Critical semi-cap equipment name.

equities.name: Lam Research
equities.notes: Etch & deposition. Key beneficiary of advanced node spending.

equities.name: Applied Materials
equities.notes: Broadest semi-cap equipment portfolio. Leading indicator of WFE investment.

equities.name: Vertiv Holdings
equities.notes: Data center cooling & power infrastructure. Pure-play AI buildout beneficiary.

equities.name: Eaton Corporation
equities.notes: Electrical power management. Grid modernization + data center power demand.

equities.name: McDonald's Corporation
equities.notes: Consumer health proxy. Value play via low-end consumer spend.

equities.name: Walmart Inc.
equities.notes: Defensive retail and lower-income consumer health proxy. Performs well when shoppers trade down.

equities.name: Costco Wholesale
equities.notes: Defensive quality retail compounder. Membership model, traffic resilience, and consumer staples overlap.

equities.name: Procter & Gamble
equities.notes: Consumer staples anchor. Defensive quality, pricing power, and risk-off relative strength candidate.

equities.name: Starbucks Corporation
equities.notes: China-sensitive consumer name. Turnaround story under new CEO.

equities.name: NIKE Inc.
equities.notes: Global consumer brand, China exposure, inventory cycle play.

equities.name: Chipotle Mexican Grill
equities.notes: Premium fast-casual. Unit growth, strong margins, consistent comp growth.

equities.name: Royal Caribbean
equities.notes: Largest cruise line. Consumer discretionary bellwether, travel demand proxy.

equities.name: D.R. Horton
equities.notes: Largest US homebuilder. Rate-sensitive housing demand and mortgage-rate relief proxy.

equities.name: Lennar Corporation
equities.notes: Major US homebuilder. Housing cycle, affordability, and rate-cut sensitivity watchlist name.

equities.name: American Tower
equities.notes: Cell tower REIT. Rate-sensitive, infrastructure-like cash flows.

equities.name: Prologis Inc.
equities.notes: Largest industrial/logistics REIT. E-commerce, data center land.

equities.name: Equinix Inc.
equities.notes: Data center colocation REIT. Direct AI compute infrastructure play.

equities.name: Booking Holdings
equities.notes: Largest OTA (Booking.com, Priceline). Travel demand proxy.

equities.name: Adobe Inc.
equities.notes: Creative software monopoly + AI (Firefly) integration.

equities.name: Oracle Corporation
equities.notes: Enterprise database lock-in. OCI cloud + AI data center demand.

equities.name: Cisco Systems
equities.notes: Networking infrastructure. AI data center switching + security.

equities.name: ConocoPhillips
equities.notes: Largest US independent E&P. Permian Basin leader, disciplined capital return.

equities.name: SLB
equities.notes: Oilfield services leader. Energy capex, international drilling, and commodity-cycle exposure.

equities.name: Visa Inc.
equities.notes: Payments data proxy for consumer spending resilience.

equities.name: United Parcel Service
equities.notes: Package volume is a real-time economic health proxy.

equities.name: FedEx Corporation
equities.notes: Express shipping demand is a leading business cycle indicator.

equities.name: CSX Corporation
equities.notes: Eastern US rail. Freight volumes signal industrial activity.

equities.name: Union Pacific
equities.notes: Largest US railroad by revenue. West Coast, agricultural commodity flows.

equities.name: Micron Technology
equities.notes: DRAM/HBM producer, direct AI infrastructure name. Key beneficiary of HBM demand for AI accelerators.

equities.name: SoFi Technologies
equities.notes: Fintech platform: lending, brokerage, crypto. Rate-sensitive, strong deposit growth, profitable.

equities.name: Applovin Corporation
equities.notes: AI-driven mobile advertising platform. Strong momentum, high-margin recurring revenue.

equities.name: ServiceNow Inc.
equities.notes: Enterprise workflow automation. AI integration (Now Assist), strong net dollar retention.

equities.name: AeroVironment Inc.
equities.notes: Defense drone / unmanned systems. Direct beneficiary of DoD modernization and drone spending surge.

equities.name: Kratos Defense & Security
equities.notes: Defense technology: drones, satellite comms, directed energy. Speculative but pure-play next-gen defense.

equities.name: Marathon Digital Holdings
equities.notes: Bitcoin mining equity. Higher-leverage BTC proxy than MSTR. Hash rate growth + BTC treasury.

equities.name: Arista Networks
equities.notes: AI data center networking and ethernet switching. Key second-order AI infrastructure name.

equities.name: Dell Technologies
equities.notes: AI server and enterprise hardware infrastructure exposure. Useful read on AI compute demand beyond chips.

equities.name: Super Micro Computer
equities.notes: High-beta AI server infrastructure. Volatile, execution/accounting-risk sensitive, but important AI hardware proxy.

equities.name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise
equities.notes: Enterprise servers, networking, and AI systems exposure.

equities.name: Cadence Design Systems
equities.notes: EDA software toll road for chip design. AI/semi infrastructure without direct chip-cycle exposure.

equities.name: Monolithic Power Systems
equities.notes: Power management semis for data center, auto, and industrial systems.

equities.notes: Mobile, edge AI, automotive, and connectivity semis. Useful contrast to AI data center chips.

equities.name: Intel
equities.notes: Turnaround/foundry/geopolitical semiconductor name. High headline sensitivity.
